overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Spider-Man walking along an urban waterfront promenade at night. The character moves past illuminated skyscrapers, street lamps, and pedestrians while the camera follows smoothly from behind, briefly tilting upward to showcase a towering glass building against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban waterfront promenade with skyline view

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the illuminated skyscraper and moon against the night sky
camera tilts back down to resume following Spider-Man at eye level

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the waterfront promenade with a relaxed gait, occasionally glancing at the city skyline

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket walking past Spider-Man in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall modern glass skyscraper with bright illuminated windows dominating the skyline
metal safety railing running along the edge of the promenade overlooking the water
dense cluster of illuminated high-rise buildings across the water
dark water reflecting the city lights
ornate black lamppost with warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along an open waterfront promenade at night, with a stunning view of illuminated skyscrapers across the water. The camera follows smoothly from behind before tilting upward to showcase a towering glass building against the starry sky, then returns to level as pedestrians pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined waterfront walkway with sports court

events.description: approaching the covered wooden pier structure at the end of the walkway

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man continuing along the promenade, passing pedestrians and approaching the pier terminus

notable_agents.action: person sitting on wooden bench looking at phone
pedestrian in business suit carrying shopping bag walking toward camera

entered.detail: mature leafy trees lining the promenade creating a canopy effect
wooden park benches with metal frames occupied by resting pedestrians
tall chain-link fence enclosing an outdoor sports court
covered wooden pier structure with support pillars extending over the water

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a tree-lined section of the waterfront walkway, with benches and pedestrians on the left and the water on the right. Spider-Man continues walking past people resting on benches and others strolling, approaching a covered pier structure at the walkway's end while the city skyline disappears from view behind the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a night-time waterfront promenade that shifts from an open urban vista to a secluded, tree-lined walkway. It begins with Spider-Man walking toward a stunning view of illuminated skyscrapers across the water, where the camera briefly tilts upward to capture a towering glass building against the starry sky. As the camera returns to a level position and pedestrians pass by, the environment transitions into a more intimate section of the path shaded by trees. The scene then shifts as the city skyline disappears from view, replaced by benches and strolling pedestrians on the left and the dark water on the right. Finally, the camera follows the character as he approaches a covered pier structure at the end of the walkway.
